title: Confetti
description: This mod turns totem particles into confetti with random colors! You can change the color to your own custom color too! This mod supports 1.18.2, with many more versions coming in the future!
body:
## What is this mod?

This mod adds a fun twist to your Minecraft gameplay by turning every totem particle into confetti with random colors. You can also choose your own color for the confetti. This mod is especially suitable for players who enjoy crystal PvP, but anyone can use it.

## Do I need any other mods to use this one?

Yes, you need two other mods to use this one:  [Cloth Config API version 6.4.90](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cloth-config/files/3972426) and [Mod Menu version 3.2.5](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu/version/3.2.5). These mods allow you to configure the color of the totem particles.

## What Minecraft versions does this mod support?

Currently, this mod ~~only supports Minecraft version 1.18.2~~ now supports 1.19 versions!

## Can I contribute to this project?
Yes, I welcome any and all contributions to my mod. You can contribute by visiting my [GitHub repository](https://github.com/SummerNugget/confetti-mod) or by checking out my [Trello list](https://trello.com/b/9zHUWJaO/confetti-mod), which shows what I'm currently working on and what you can contribute or add to the mod. If you submit a pull request, I will review it and accept it if it doesn't break anything in the mod and adds some important feature to it.
